name: huage-commercial-os
description: HUAGE GROUP commercial operations management MVP focused on the subsidiary supervision vertical slice.

scripts.cf:d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.cf:d1:seed:local: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file apps/api/d1/seed.sql
scripts.cf:d1:seed:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file apps/api/d1/seed.sql
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:seed:generate && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.check: npm run db:schema:check && npm run db:seed:check && npm run cf:seed:check && npm run db:migrate:dry-run && npm run api:contract:check && npm run build && node apps/api/server.mjs --check
